response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development and demonstrates strong technical skills in multiple languages (C/C++, JavaScript, TypeScript, D, Python not explicitly mentioned). However, his resume lacks direct experience with embedded networking, Linux kernel modifications, security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, etc.), or LAN-switch products. His work is heavily focused on web, mobile, and desktop applications, with no clear evidence of embedded systems or networking expertise. His language skills (Japanese not listed) and industry background (Kenya-based roles) also raise concerns.
strengths: Strong C/C++ proficiency with embedded-like experience (LabWindows/CVI, NI tools)
Diverse programming language expertise (JavaScript, TypeScript, D, Python not explicitly mentioned)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, robotic arms) and work in team environments
concerns: No explicit experience with networking (Layer 2/3), embedded firmware, or LAN-switch products
No mention of security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption, etc.) or Linux kernel modifications
Lacks required Japanese language proficiency (resume in English only, no Japanese listed)
